signIn.errLinkInvalid: We couldn't validate this confirmation link. Try signing in with your password.
signIn.errLinkIncomplete: This confirmation link is incomplete. Open it directly from the email, without copying and pasting.

footer.about: Qualified trading partners for international commerce, to help you grow your business.

hero.badge: Marketplace of verified B2B trading partners
hero.title: Qualified importer and distributor lists for your international trade.
hero.subtitle: Find exactly the trading partners that fit your product and your export strategy.

intro.lede: Our qualified importer and distributor lists are built for manufacturers, producers, and brand owners looking for new trading partners abroad.
intro.p1: Select by country, industry, language region, or buying profile and receive ready-to-use databases, updated on a regular basis.
intro.p2: Our lists include exclusively carefully verified companies with a proven interest in adding new products and brands from abroad to their portfolio. This saves you lengthy research and countless contacts with companies that have no interest in new suppliers.

zielmaerkte.title: Precise selection by your target markets.
zielmaerkte.intro: You get lists for individual countries or entire language regions, for example:
zielmaerkte.note: We also offer industry-specific lists for a range of sectors and product groups. Step by step, we're expanding our offering with qualified lists for markets around the world.

einkaufsprofile.title: Not every importer is the same.
einkaufsprofile.intro: Our databases distinguish between several buying profiles:
einkaufsprofile.close: This lets you focus your sales activities exactly on the trading partners suited to your product.

cards.title: Global buyers
cards.body: Companies looking for new products and suppliers worldwide.

cards.title: EU-focused
cards.body: Importers that buy exclusively within the European Union.

cards.title: Mercosur-oriented
cards.body: Companies that preferably import from Mercosur.

cards.title: Regional specialists
cards.body: Specialists with clearly defined sourcing markets.

lieferumfang.title: More than address lists.
lieferumfang.reportBody: Every list includes an up-to-date market report with valuable information on the industry and sales opportunities in the target market.
lieferumfang.listIntro: You also get practical guidance on the following topics:
lieferumfang.close: This increases your export campaign's chances of success right from the first contact.
items: What information and documents importers expect before a partnership
How to approach potential distributors professionally
Which sales arguments are most promising on first contact

daten.title: Regularly updated data.
daten.body: All lists are continuously maintained and updated. New market participants are added, inactive companies are removed, and existing records are reviewed regularly. This means you always work with current and reliable information.

vorteil.title: Save time and increase your sales success.
vorteil.body: Instead of spending weeks or months researching suitable importers and distributors, you immediately receive a qualified selection of potential trading partners that fit your product and your target market. This lets you focus on what matters — successfully building your international trade.

howItWorks.title: From search to ready-to-use file in three steps.

steps.title: Filter
steps.body: Browse by countries, language regions, industries, and buying profiles to find lists that fit your campaign.

steps.title: Buy
steps.body: Review volume, price per lead, and list details before completing your order with secure checkout.

steps.title: Download
steps.body: After confirmation, access the files in CSV or Excel and put them to work in your sales process.

zahlen._placeholder: PLACEHOLDER: fictional numbers from the handoff — replace with real data or connect to the backend before go-live.
zahlen.title: Trust built on results.

blog.title: Market analyses, industry reports, and export opportunities.
blog.intro: On our blog we regularly publish market analyses, industry reports, and information on export opportunities, trade trends, and sales possibilities across various countries and regions. This keeps you up to date on international market developments.

cta.title: Ready to build your international trade?
cta.body: Browse the catalog and find qualified importers and distributors that fit your product and target market.

meta.title: Qualified importer and distributor lists for your international trade
meta.description: Qualified importer and distributor lists by country, industry, and buying profile. Verified companies, up-to-date market reports, and regularly reviewed data for your export business.

page.title: Frequently asked questions
page.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about our importer and distributor lists.
page.metaDescription: Answers to frequently asked questions about our importer and distributor lists: data quality, formats, payment, and more.

faq._placeholder: PLACEHOLDER: provisional answers — review/confirm all before go-live. The LGPD/GDPR answer is intentionally left blank.

items.question: Where does the data come from and how is it verified?
items.answer: [PLACEHOLDER] Our data comes from carefully vetted sources and is manually verified before being added to our lists.

items.question: How current are the lists?
items.answer: [PLACEHOLDER] All lists are maintained regularly: new market participants are added, inactive companies are removed, and existing records are reviewed.

items.question: What formats do I receive the data in?
items.answer: [PLACEHOLDER] You receive the files in CSV or Excel — ready to use in your sales process and compatible with the leading CRMs.

items.question: Can I see the data before buying?
items.answer: [PLACEHOLDER] Yes, every list includes a preview with anonymized sample records.

items.question: How does payment work?
items.answer: [PLACEHOLDER] Payment is made via secure PayPal checkout. After confirmation, the files are available for download immediately.

items.question: Which countries and industries are lists available for?
items.answer: [PLACEHOLDER] We offer lists for individual countries and entire language regions, as well as industry-specific lists for a range of sectors. The offering is continuously expanded.

items.question: What's included in the market report that comes with the list?
items.answer: [PLACEHOLDER] Every list includes an up-to-date market report with information on the market and competitive situation, sales opportunities, and practical guidance for approaching potential trading partners.

form.title: Didn't find your question?

form.name: Name

form.consent: I have read and agree to the <link>Privacy Policy</link>.

errors.name: Please enter your name.

errors.subject: Please enter a subject.
errors.message: Your question must be at least 10 characters long.
errors.consent: You must agree to the Privacy Policy.

listing.coverageSubtitle: Use these signals to check whether this database fits your campaign.
listing.previewSubtitle: Sample of {count} records to check structure and quality before buying.
listing.oneOffNote: One-off purchase, no subscription. Access remains available in your My Purchases area.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.subtitle: Complete payment to unlock {count} leads in CSV and Excel.
checkout.secureDesc: PayPal processes the payment; the system releases your purchase automatically after confirmation.
checkout.redirectNote: You'll be redirected within PayPal's own flow to authorize the transaction.
checkout.summaryItems: {count, plural, one {# list} other {# lists}} in the order
checkout.unavailable: Payment is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a few minutes.
checkout.sessionExpiredPay: Your session has expired. Sign in again to complete the purchase.
checkout.sessionExpiredOrder: Your session has expired. Sign in again to view the order.
checkout.createFailed: We couldn't start the payment. Please try again.
checkout.captureFailed: We couldn't confirm the payment. If the amount was charged, the order will appear in My Purchases within a few minutes.
checkout.successMetaDescription: Your purchase has been confirmed successfully
checkout.successSubtitle: Your order has been approved and the lists are now available for download.
checkout.successNextDownloadText: CSV or Excel in My Purchases.
checkout.successNextProspectText: Import the contacts into your CRM or prospecting tool.
checkout.successNextReceiptText: The receipt was sent to your email.
checkout.cancelSubtitle: No charge was completed. You can review your cart or try checkout again.
